[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00011110 4
4 10011000 3
5 00000001 1
6 00100101 3
7 11110000 4

01 00000110 2
12 10011000 3 match 4
23 00000000 a match 0 1 2
34 00000101 2
45 01100000 2

67 00010000 1
70 00100001 2
